title: TinyTech
description: A small tech modpack with included optimisations mods! containing many client and server optimisations, similar to the popular Fabulously Optimised or Simply Optimised packs.
body:
A small tech modpack with included optimisations mods! containing many client and server optimisations, similar to the popular Fabulously Optimised or Simply Optimised packs. Most of the included mods aim to improve the vanilla game without losing its identity. In addition, three major tech mods are included: AE2, TechReborn and IndRev. All of these work well together, as they can reuse the same power system as seen in the old Forge packs. I tried to make it both lightweight and feature-rich, so it runs well but also has a lot of content. Have fun with it!

I recommend a vanilla style resource pack, as I could not find a resource pack with support for the new mod blocks. It should also work well with shaders!
